array.string: mkdir -p "$HOME/Library/Logs/things-sak"; set -a; . "$HOME/Library/Application Support/things-sak/things-sak.env"; set +a; if [ -n "$THINGS_SAK_ALLOWED_HOST" ]; then set -- --allowed-host "$THINGS_SAK_ALLOWED_HOST"; else set --; fi; exec "$HOME/.cargo/bin/things-sak" serve --bind "${THINGS_SAK_BIND:-127.0.0.1}" --port "${THINGS_SAK_PORT:-32123}" "$@" >> "$HOME/Library/Logs/things-sak/things-sak.out.log" 2>> "$HOME/Library/Logs/things-sak/things-sak.err.log"
